codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements: entities stored as nodes with types (18 SemanticEntityType variants), relationships as typed edges (14 SemanticRelationType variants), and query by entity or relationship type via SqliteSemanticStore. Full CRUD operations implemented with cascade delete for entity relations. 12 unit tests provide coverage for all core functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed project conventions as documented in AGENTS.md - async_trait for async trait methods, sqlx for database operations, proper error handling with SwellError, chrono for timestamps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: swell-memory/src/semantic.rs uses async_trait::async_trait, returns Result<T, SwellError>, uses chrono::{DateTime, Utc}

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the Rust skill procedure correctly. The skill emphasizes ownership, borrowing, error handling patterns - all properly implemented. The transcript shows the worker creating semantic.rs, running tests, and fixing a parse method naming issue (from_str to parse) which demonstrates attention to Rust conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: Create semantic.rs → cargo build → cargo test → clippy fix (from_str → parse) → cargo test again

summary: Feature mem-semantic-memory passes scrutiny review. Implementation provides graph-based semantic knowledge storage with SemanticEntity (18 types) and SemanticRelation (14 types) nodes, backed by SqliteSemanticStore with full CRUD, query by type/name, cascade delete, and 12 unit tests. All verification steps passed (cargo build, cargo test --semantic, clippy, fmt). No blocking issues identified.
